PR title must use conventional-commits format:
  feat: short description        → new feature (minor bump)
  fix: short description         → bug fix (patch bump)
  perf|refactor|docs|chore|test|build|ci|revert: ...  → no release by itself

For a breaking change, add a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer below.
The PR title + body become the squash-commit message and the changelog entry.
-->
